requirement_topic.en: Market Access — ISC Conformity, Import Inspection and In-Country Importer of Record
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入——ISC合格评定、进口检验与境内进口商主体
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入——ISC合格評定、進口檢驗與境內進口商主體

summary.en: Market access for lithium batteries and power banks in Cambodia is organised around the Institute of Standards of Cambodia （ISC）, which sets Cambodian Standards （CS） adopting IEC/ASEAN references and operates conformity assessment and import inspection for regulated products, together with the Ministry of Commerce and the General Department of Customs and Excise for import clearance. Unlike the EU, there is no EU-Authorised-Representative or per-state EPR/WEEE registration; instead, the operative legal presence is a Cambodian importer of record （a locally registered importer/distributor） who holds the import documentation, presents product test reports and labelling at customs/ISC inspection, and is the in-country point of accountability. Goods commonly enter via the ports of Sihanoukville and Phnom Penh. Cambodia's grid is 230 V / 50 Hz （same 50 Hz as China; nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V）, which matters for any AC adapter shipped with the product.
summary.zh: 锂电池及移动电源在柬埔寨的市场准入以柬埔寨标准局（ISC）为中心；ISC制定采用IEC/东盟参考的柬埔寨标准（CS），并对受监管产品实施合格评定与进口检验，配合商业部及海关总署完成进口清关。与欧盟不同，不存在欧盟授权代表或逐州EPR/WEEE注册；具有效力的法律主体是柬埔寨进口商（本地注册的进口商/分销商），其持有进口文件，在海关/ISC检验时出示产品检测报告与标签，并作为境内责任主体。货物通常经西哈努克港和金边港入境。柬埔寨电网为230 V / 50 Hz（与中国同为50 Hz；标称电压不同于中国的220/380 V），这对随产品出货的任何交流适配器有影响。
summary.zht: 鋰電池及行動電源在柬埔寨的市場准入以柬埔寨標準局（ISC）為中心；ISC制定採用IEC/東盟參考的柬埔寨標準（CS），並對受監管產品實施合格評定與進口檢驗，配合商業部及海關總署完成進口清關。與歐盟不同，不存在歐盟授權代表或逐州EPR/WEEE登記；具有效力的法律主體是柬埔寨進口商（本地註冊的進口商/分銷商），其持有進口文件，在海關/ISC檢驗時出示產品檢測報告與標籤，並作為境內責任主體。貨物通常經西哈努克港和金邊港入境。柬埔寨電網為230 V / 50 Hz（與中國同為50 Hz；標稱電壓不同於中國的220/380 V），這對隨產品出貨的任何交流適配器有影響。

standards_or_laws: Institute of Standards of Cambodia （ISC） — CS standards, conformity assessment, import inspection
Ministry of Commerce / General Department of Customs and Excise — import registration and clearance
Cambodian importer of record （locally registered importer/distributor）
No EU-style Authorised Representative or per-state EPR/WEEE registration

summary.en: In China, market access for portable lithium batteries rests on GB 31241 product-safety compliance and, where catalogue-listed, CCC certification, with the manufacturer or a domestic responsible entity handling compliance. There is no concept of a foreign authorised representative because the focus is the domestic market. A Chinese manufacturer's domestic registration, GB 31241 reports, and CCC certificate are domestic instruments and do not establish a legal importer of record or conformity acceptance in Cambodia.
summary.zh: 在中国，便携式锂电池的市场准入依托GB 31241产品安全符合性，列入目录时还需CCC认证，由制造商或国内责任主体处理合规事宜。由于聚焦国内市场，不存在境外授权代表的概念。中国制造商的国内注册、GB 31241报告及CCC证书均为国内文书，不能在柬埔寨确立法定进口商主体或合格评定认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，便攜式鋰電池的市場准入依託GB 31241產品安全符合性，列入目錄時還需CCC認證，由製造商或國內責任主體處理合規事宜。由於聚焦國內市場，不存在境外授權代表的概念。中國製造商的國內註冊、GB 31241報告及CCC證書均為國內文書，不能在柬埔寨確立法定進口商主體或合格評定認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 — product-safety basis for the Chinese domestic market

gap.en: The Cambodian market-access structure differs from both China and the EU. There is no EU-style Authorised Representative and no per-state EPR/WEEE registration; instead a Cambodian importer of record is the in-country accountable party at customs and ISC inspection. Key gaps: （1） a locally registered importer/distributor must be appointed to hold import and conformity documentation; （2） product test reports （IEC 62133-2, UN 38.3） and compliant labelling must be presented for import inspection at Sihanoukville or Phnom Penh; （3） any bundled AC adapter must suit 230 V / 50 Hz; （4） Chinese GB 31241/CCC documents support engineering analysis but do not by themselves clear ISC conformity or customs.
gap.zh: 柬埔寨的市场准入结构既不同于中国也不同于欧盟。没有欧盟式授权代表，也没有逐州EPR/WEEE注册；境内责任主体是柬埔寨进口商，于海关与ISC检验时承担责任。主要差距：（1）须指定本地注册的进口商/分销商持有进口与合格评定文件；（2）须在西哈努克港或金边港的进口检验时出示产品检测报告（IEC 62133-2、UN 38.3）及合规标签；（3）任何随附交流适配器须适配230 V / 50 Hz；（4）中国GB 31241/CCC文件可支持工程分析，但本身不能通过ISC合格评定或海关。
gap.zht: 柬埔寨的市場准入結構既不同於中國也不同於歐盟。沒有歐盟式授權代表，也沒有逐州EPR/WEEE登記；境內責任主體是柬埔寨進口商，於海關與ISC檢驗時承擔責任。主要差距：（1）須指定本地註冊的進口商/分銷商持有進口與合格評定文件；（2）須在西哈努克港或金邊港的進口檢驗時出示產品檢測報告（IEC 62133-2、UN 38.3）及合規標籤；（3）任何隨附交流適配器須適配230 V / 50 Hz；（4）中國GB 31241/CCC文件可支持工程分析，但本身不能通過ISC合格評定或海關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice — a Cambodian importer of record plus ISC conformity/import inspection and customs clearance are required to place product on the market; no EU-style Authorised Representative or per-state EPR/WEEE registration exists
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241 product-safety compliance and CCC where catalogue-listed; no foreign authorised-representative concept

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] To reach the Cambodian market, appoint a locally registered importer of record and clear ISC conformity/import inspection plus customs at Sihanoukville or Phnom Penh, presenting IEC 62133-2 and UN 38.3 reports with compliant labelling; ensure any bundled adapter suits 230 V / 50 Hz. There is no EU-style Authorised Representative or per-state EPR/WEEE step. Chinese GB 31241/CCC documents are domestic and do not by themselves clear ISC or customs. Verify current ISC, Ministry of Commerce, and customs requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入柬埔寨市场，应指定本地注册的进口商主体，并在西哈努克港或金边港通过ISC合格评定/进口检验及海关，出示IEC 62133-2与UN 38.3报告及合规标签；确保任何随附适配器适配230 V / 50 Hz。不存在欧盟式授权代表或逐州EPR/WEEE环节。中国GB 31241/CCC文件属国内性质，本身不能通过ISC或海关。发货前请核实ISC、商业部及海关的现行要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入柬埔寨市場，應指定本地註冊的進口商主體，並在西哈努克港或金邊港通過ISC合格評定/進口檢驗及海關，出示IEC 62133-2與UN 38.3報告及合規標籤；確保任何隨附適配器適配230 V / 50 Hz。不存在歐盟式授權代表或逐州EPR/WEEE環節。中國GB 31241/CCC文件屬國內性質，本身不能通過ISC或海關。發貨前請核實ISC、商業部及海關的現行要求。
